headline: Is Ventas (VTR) Pricing Look-Stretched After Strong Multi-Year Share Price Performance
summary: If you are wondering whether Ventas is still fairly priced after a strong run, this article will walk through what the current share price might be implying about its value. With Ventas trading at US$86.56 and returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 1.5% over 30 days, 11.9% year to date, 33.0% over 1 year, 116.4% over 3 years and 88.5% over 5 years, many investors are asking what is already baked into the price. Recent coverage of Ventas has centered on its position as a large healthcare focused real...

headline: A Crude Awakening
summary: U.S. equities slid to 4-month lows as the Iran war rattled markets, sending oil to three-year highs. Read why this could be a 'crude' awakening for REITs.
